title: 2 Stocks Making Money From High Food Prices
text: It's time to look at stocks that benefit from rising commodity prices in order to balance your portfolio.

title: 7 Best Blue-Chip Stocks to Buy Now for Safety
text: The S&P 500 is down more than 15% in 2022. That makes it difficult to find the best blue-chip stocks to buy to keep the bear market away.

title: Consider S&P names Nutrien and Corteva which have returned double digits YTD
text: As investors look for defensive names, Nutrien Ltd (NYSE:NTR) and Corteva (NYSE:CTVA) offer great options. Being agricultural companies, they operate in a sector that faces limited macroeconomic shocks.

title: DOLE vs. CTVA: Which Stock Should Value Investors Buy Now?
text: DOLE vs. CTVA: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: Corteva's (CTVA) CEO Chuck Magro on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Corteva, Inc. (NYSE:CTVA ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 5, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Jeff Rudolph – Vice President-Investor Relations Chuck Magro – Chief Executive Officer Dave Anderson – Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Tim Glenn – Executive Vice President-Seed Business Unit Robert King – Executive Vice President-Crop Protection Business Unit Conference Call Participants Vincent Andrews – Morgan Stanley Dave Begleiter – Deutsche Bank Chris Parkinson – Mizuho Kevin McCarthy – Vertical Research Partners Patrick Cunningham – Citi Alex Chen – BMO Capital Markets Steve Byrne – Bank of America Michael Piken – Cleveland Research Lucas Beaumont – UBS Frank Mitsch – Fermium Research Adam Samuelson – Goldman Sachs Operator Good day, and welcome to the Corteva First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. Today's conference is being recorded.

title: Corteva: A Top Pick For A High-Inflation Environment
text: Corteva is outperforming the S&P 500 as well as the iShares VEGI and has the potential to further outperform in a high-inflation environment. Significant growth opportunity with projected 13.17% FCF and 8.26% EBIT CAGR over the next 5 years.

title: Corteva, Inc. (CTVA) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Corteva, Inc. (CTVA) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 19.75% and 1.87%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Corteva profit up 20% on solid demand for crop protection products
text: Corteva Inc on Wednesday reported a 19.6% rise in operating earnings for the first quarter, driven by strong demand for crop protection products such as herbicides and insecticides.
